productDisplayName: Mark Taylor Men Printed Brown T-shirt
description: Composition Brown round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, a ribbed neckline and graphic print on the chest Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Remove promptly and line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery mark taylor's fresh take on the classic statement T-shirt resulted in this piece.
